title: buildah info should probably indicate runtime
body:
The `buildah info` command should probably include something like podman's `OCIRuntime`. Right now it's not easy to figure out whether it's runc or crun:
```
# buildah run --help|grep runtime
      --runtime path               path to an alternate OCI runtime (default "crun")
      --runtime-flag strings       add global flags for the container runtime
```

buildah-1.12.0-0.59.dev.git1967973.fc32.x86_64

comments.body: I concur @edsantiago and the fix is probably close to the one that @giuseppe did for Podman at https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4141
I can start working on this issue if no one else is
Thanks @m7mdkamal !  I've assigned you to it.
@m7mdkamal Feel free to grab issues, we can always use more help.
